action.reasoning: Observation: pipeline is stable and 120k-step stacked PPO still gets zero reward on all eval tasks. Analysis: pure sparse-reward multitask PPO from pixels is not learning enough; Minigrid commonly benefits from the built-in symbolic wrappers and a simpler fully observed representation. A stronger next move is to switch to FullyObsWrapper + one-hot/object embeddings so the agent sees the whole grid, which should dramatically reduce partial observability and exploration difficulty while still using real Minigrid. Runtime for 120k was only ~3.2 min, so we can afford a moderate retrain and immediate eval. Decision: rewrite wrappers/model to use fully observed symbolic grids, train PPO for 300k timesteps on the 7-task mixture, locally test predict.py, then submit eval.
action.command: python train.py --total_timesteps 300000 --save_dir checkpoints/fullobs_300k && python predict.py --data_path local_eval_data --checkpoint checkpoints/fullobs_300k --output local_pred.json && cat local_pred.json
